subject: TRUMP
body:
Jeffrey

Just remembered, POTUS is in PBI until 4:30pm today,. We cannot fly from STT to PBI since we are not departing from a TSA approved scanning airport. We could land Fort Lauderdale or Stuart only,. If you elected to arrive before 4:30pm.,

After 4:30pm PBI arrival is OK,.

Thx

Larry

Sent from my iPad
